service.name: corewaf-bridge
service.description: Phase 2 bridge stack — caddy-internal (docker-label proxy + ACME), caddy-bridge (operator action listener), alloy (telemetry), valkey (state). Launched by `orchestrator run` from the foundation tier (waf/corewaf-starter-kit/compose.yml's `orchestrator` service) once `tunnel` is healthy. `run` applies the docker.volumes declarations before docker-compose-up; the `compose` verbs are operational-only primitives (post orchestrator commit 6a0d7fc).
